feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fiori reset screen appearance
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I have changed screen appearance in

user profile > setting > appearance to be color beige

Somehow I try to choose user setting again but the screen not display.

anyway to reset screen appearance from SAPGUI 

or anyway to reset this back.

entry.title: Fiori : add column from calculation in layout view
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

any possibilities to add new column from calculation in layout view.

preferred  new column = target - consumed

Pls advise

entry.title: Flexible Workflow - Agent Determination Rule Failed
entry.content:
Hello!

I have set up the flexible workflow scenario for Sales Orders and I want to use the team Functionality .

I set up the Teams and Responsibilities : 

and the respective sales workflows

My workflows are getting triggered ,but there's no agent determined.

You can see the error below:

Now , it seemed strange to me that the system can't find the agent responsibility rule ,so I digged in and find the standard rule ID for the workflow template

So , my guess is that this rule /FUNC/CMR1LVLA ,cannot be determined.

I used the fiori apps "Manage Responsibility Rules" and "Manage Responsibility Context"

In the first one , there is no /FUNC/CMR1LVLA in the list , which strikes me as unusual.

Also in the second one , there is no agent rule assigned.

So , is there something missing? 

I would expect to see the /FUNC/CMR1LVLA in the Responsibility Rules and Assigned to WS02000006 in the Responsibility Context.

Do I have to "install" these via a note or something?

Also , is there anything else I can check?

entry.title: How to make an infinity scrolling in macros table?
entry.content:
I want to make a dialog that can scrolling for load content for the table. I using sap.fe.macros.Table to make a table content in a dialog and try to put it in a ScrollContainer like the code below:

  <Dialog title="Product" id="idDialog">
    <VBox class="sapUiSmallMargin">
      <macros:FilterBar
        metaPath="@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields"
        id="idFilterBar"
        liveMode="true"
      />
      <ScrollContainer
        height="100%"
        width="100%"
        vertical="true"
        focusable="true">
      <macros:Table
        id="idTable"
        metaPath="products/@UI.PresentationVariant#Dialog"
        readOnly="true"
        isSearchable="true"
        enableExport="true"
        disableCopyToClipboard="true"
        enableAutoColumnWidth="true"
        headerVisible="false"
        filterBar="ActivityLogsFilterBar"
      >
      </macros:Table>
     </ScrollContainer>
    </VBox>
  </Dialog>

the output look like this:

It have the scroll bar but still have more button and only load data when click more button, I want it will load data when I scroll and not show the more button like that.

Can anyone help!

entry.title: Fiori workflow suspend task
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

in my Inbox, I click SUSPEND task for approval for later data.

Where I can see those suspend task to recall back to today date pls?

Thanks in advance.

entry.content:

many reports has SUBSCRIBE button.

When it will alert and how often it will send alert to us.

For example for report Contract Expiry.

in Manage Situation Types app

I cannot find PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR tempate there.

Pls advise.

entry.title: S4HANA Manage Situation object, Manage Situation - extended not found
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

really cannot find this 3 apps 

  1. Manage Situation Object
  2. Manage Situation Scenarios
  3. Manage Situation - extended

pls advise

entry.title: Value help search in Smart Filterbar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have requirement to add valuehelpsearch in the smart filterbar. I have already created custom fiori app which has smartfilterbar and smarttable which are refering some "abcentitySet" like below 

When i click on CompCode filter its not showing the search option , requirement is to search by Id and Name and get the results. So user can select 

Now my requirement is when user clicks on Compcode filter it should call diff  "xyzentityset" and display user to select. Below is the expected result

 

Can someone please throw some light on this and how can i achieve it ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Fiori no app display
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I try to add APP to my user. but nothing display.

Pls advise.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to read and parse SAMLResponse in custom Odata read call
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can you please suggest if SAML Response can be read in a custom Odata Read call in below scenario.

1. When user logs in to the portal, SSO authentication is done. During this authentication process, the logged in user is changed based on the configuration in USREXTID table. For example, if user A is maintained as substitute of user B, then user A will access all applications as user B. This is as per SAML configurations.

2. After authentication, while loading the landing page in Fiori there is a Odata call to backend to fetch user attributes. In this call, we are able to fetch attributes of only UserB (as per above configuration). But in this call, we also want to read the actual user ID who is accessing the application. Is it possible to read SAML response or NameID attribute in odata read call.

3. We do not want to read the data from table USREXTID, because same user can have multiple substitute users. Hence, we want to know if its possible to read and parse SAMLresponse.

Best Regards!

entry.title: Fiori Item Category D disappeared
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

the item category D is active by default in SAP back end but on Fiori not show item category = D.

anywhere to activate this.materi

entry.title: How to change target mapping parameters for a fiori app?
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to use the F1511A - Create Maintenance Request app for creating notification type M1 - Maintenance Request. But as mentioned in the target mapping of the app - Notification type = Y1 desn't allow to create such notification.


If we try to modify the target mapping parameter values using fiori launchpad designer - the system shows the following warning. And it will break the reference with the tile and in the technical catalog everything gets deleted.


Does anyone have an idea, how to proceed with the such customization?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAML2 SSO – Extension for Dynamic Attribute Mapping in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have implemented SAML2 SSO for an SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system using an external Identity Provider (IdP). The authentication process is working as expected, with Name ID Format set to PERSISTENT and user mapping configured in the standard table SAML2_PIDFED.

Challenge

Due to compliance requirements, storing the IdP user ID in SAP for mapping purposes is not permitted. As a result, we are exploring an alternative approach to achieve user mapping without storing the IdP user ID directly.

Proposed Approach

The idea is to extend the SAML2.0 authentication process to call a third-party web service that provides an additional attribute (which can be legally stored) to be used for mapping instead of the IdP user ID. The high-level process would be:

  1. User accesses the SAP Fiori URL, triggering a redirect to the IdP authentication page.
  2. The user logs in via the IdP authentication process.
  3. The IdP sends a SAML2 response containing the IdP user ID.
  4. (Code Extension) SAP calls a third-party web service using the IdP user ID to retrieve a new attribute.
  5. SAP performs user mapping using the new attribute instead of the IdP user ID.
  6. The user is successfully logged into Fiori with their SAP username.

Questions for the Community

  1. Is it possible to extend the SAML2.0 authentication process in SAP S/4HANA to support this approach?
  2. What would be the best extension points (e.g., BAdIs, enhancement spots, user exits) to achieve this customization?
  3. Are there any potential risks or best practices we should consider when modifying the SAML2 authentication flow in this way?

Any guidance, experiences, or references to similar implementations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: Pre-delivered templates not available in App ''Maintain Email Templates'
entry.content:
When calling the app 'Maintain Email Templates', in the pre-delivered tab, we cannot find the following templates for the quotation management:

  • New approval request: SD_SLS_QTN_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Approval reminder: SD_SLS_QTN_DEADLINE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document release: SD_SLS_QTN_RELEASE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rejection: SD_SLS_QTN_REJECT_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rework request: SD_SLS_QTN_REWORK_EMAIL_TMPL

Is there a way to upload them? Should we create them from scratch via SE80?

entry.title: smarttable sorting is not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have smart table where on load some data is getting populated , now i want to sort the data of the smart table without calling the backend. 

Is there any setting or property where smart table automatically does the sorting and filtering ? 

KR,

entry.title: Variant management and personalization service for app deployed on BTP
entry.content:
I deployed a freestyle app to BTP and also created a SAP Build Workzone site and I can access the app via a tile there. I want to be able to use variant management for this app but the requests keep giving me a 404 error

Is there something else that I need to add?

entry.title: How to bind sap.fe.macros table to data from association?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this time anyone answers my question... 

I'm working on a FE app using Flexible Programming Model and OData V4. I'm trying to call a dialog upon pressing an action button on the object page. The dialog should contain a macros table with the data that comes from the root entity's association. Unfortunately, whatever I try, it doesn't display any data. Here's the working example where my dialog displays the root entity's data (which isn't what I want to achieve):

<macros:Table id="changeHistoryDialogTable"
metaPath="/BatchRelease/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem"
readOnly="true" />

 

But I want something like this:
 
<macros:Table id="changeHistoryDialogTable"
metaPath="/BatchRelease/_ChangeHistory/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem"
readOnly="true" />​
 
And it doesn't work. I tried passing contextPath, all possible combinations in the metaPath field - all in vain.
 
My Fiori version is 1.108.37 (S/4HANA On-Prem 2022)
 
I'd appreciate any suggestions.
Regrads,
Mykyta

entry.title: Fiori disable create dialog for UUID field using Fiori OData v4 with draft
entry.content:
Hi Devs,

do you know if there is a setting what we can apply for RAP backends to suppress the Create Dialog?

Our scenario is OData v4 draft enabled based on RAP.
Unfortunately beside the managed numbering mentioned here we have other UUID fields (foreign keys) which result in showing the dialog, but the goal is to suppress it.

In OData V2 apps w/o draft the behavior is the opposite, you need to explicitly specify in manifest.json the setting "createWithParameterDialog" to have a similar dialog.

Workaround I want to eliminate, is that we do hack into the Fiori Elements template events from extensions, to hook our custom handlers. This way we can react on dialog open, to be able to fill fields (context) in the background of the empty new draft entity instance being created.

Otherwise context dependent value helps with additional binding defined in ABAP CDS does not work.

Custom dialogs we can do of course, but there is maybe a magic which works, just simply I missed to identify it.
Thank You for any advise, which is not an unstable layout dependent workaround like the above  😏 !
BR,Attila

entry.title: Filter button shortcut in SmartTable column menu - removed from latest SAPUI5 version 1.133.0
entry.content:
Hi All

Today after the UI5 version update to 1.133.0 in BTP Launchpad, We saw the 'filter' button shortcut was removed from the SmartTable column menu in our deployed apps. Only the 'Sort By' shortcut was available. Our customer thinks it is not intuitive and needs multiple clicks just to get to a simple filter operation. They would rather want the filter button back in the column menu. I checked in SAPUI5 samples and there too it is the same after we changed the version.
Is there any way I can bring back the filter button shortcut in SmartTable column? 

Thanks.

After the 1.133.0 version update 



Before version update (1.132.0)
